title: viola variegata
intro: Viola variegata, also known as the pale violet, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the violet family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola variegata include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and acting as a natural antihistamine, making it useful for allergy relief. Herbal preparations of Viola variegata often include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used externally or internally to reap its benefits.
